criteria_verification.criterion_text: `BuildState` enum re-exported (single source of truth — the
criteria_verification.evidence: src/forge/lifecycle/state_machine.py imports BuildState from forge.pipeline.supervisor and re-exports it via __all__. No parallel definition exists. The TestBuildStateReExport::test_enum_is_re_exported_from_supervisor test uses `assert sm.BuildState is supervisor.BuildState` — identity check proves they are the same object. Missing lifecycle states (QUEUED, INTERRUPTED, SKIPPED) were added to the supervisor enum (the single source of truth) rather than being re-defined elsewhere.
criteria_verification.notes: src/forge/lifecycle/state_machine.py imports BuildState from forge.pipeline.supervisor and re-exports it via __all__. No parallel definition exists. The TestBuildStateReExport::test_enum_is_re_exported_from_supervisor test uses `assert sm.BuildState is supervisor.BuildState` — identity check proves they are the same object. Missing lifecycle states (QUEUED, INTERRUPTED, SKIPPED) were added to the supervisor enum (the single source of truth) rather than being re-defined elsewhere.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `TRANSITION_TABLE` defined as a frozen mapping; immutable at runtime
criteria_verification.evidence: TRANSITION_TABLE is declared with typing.Final and every value is a frozenset (cannot be mutated). TestTransitionTable::test_target_sets_are_frozen and test_terminal_rows_are_empty enforce this. test_every_state_has_a_row enforces full coverage of the BuildState enum.

criteria_verification.evidence: transition() builds a Pydantic Transition with frozen=True and extra='forbid'. TestTransitionHappyPath::test_every_allowed_transition_succeeds parametrises all 29 allowed transitions and confirms a Transition is returned with correct from/to/build_id/occurred_at fields.

TestTransitionHappyPath::test_every_allowed_transition_succeeds parametrises all 29 allowed transitions and confirms a Transition is returned with correct from/to/build_id/occurred_at fields.

criteria_verification.evidence: InvalidTransitionError subclasses ValueError and exposes build_id, from_state, to_state attributes. TestInvalidTransitions::test_invalid_jump_raises asserts a QUEUED→COMPLETE attempt raises with correct fields; test_error_message_includes_state_names asserts the message format; test_error_is_a_valueerror confirms inheritance.
criteria_verification.notes: InvalidTransitionError subclasses ValueError and exposes build_id, from_state, to_state attributes. TestInvalidTransitions::test_invalid_jump_raises asserts a QUEUED→COMPLETE attempt raises with correct fields; test_error_message_includes_state_names asserts the message format; test_error_is_a_valueerror confirms inheritance.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Terminal-state transitions set `completed_at` automatically if not
criteria_verification.evidence: transition() detects to_state in TERMINAL_STATES and populates completed_at = now if the caller did not pass one. TestCompletedAtInvariant::test_completed_at_auto_populated covers all four terminal states (COMPLETE, FAILED, CANCELLED, SKIPPED). test_explicit_completed_at_is_preserved confirms caller overrides are honoured. test_non_terminal_transition_does_not_set_completed_at confirms non-terminal transitions leave completed_at=None.
criteria_verification.notes: transition() detects to_state in TERMINAL_STATES and populates completed_at = now if the caller did not pass one. TestCompletedAtInvariant::test_completed_at_auto_populated covers all four terminal states (COMPLETE, FAILED, CANCELLED, SKIPPED). test_explicit_completed_at_is_preserved confirms caller overrides are honoured. test_non_terminal_transition_does_not_set_completed_at confirms non-terminal transitions leave completed_at=None.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: PAUSED transitions accept and carry forward
criteria_verification.evidence: Transition has the optional pending_approval_request_id field. TestPausedApprovalCarryForward::test_paused_transition_carries_request_id passes a request id through transition(_build(RUNNING), PAUSED, pending_approval_request_id='req-abc-123') and asserts it lands on the value object. test_resume_from_paused_can_clear_the_id confirms the field defaults to None when omitted (so persistence can clear the column on RUNNING resume).
criteria_verification.notes: Transition has the optional pending_approval_request_id field. criteria_verification.criterion_text: Property test: no transition out of a terminal state succeeds
criteria_verification.evidence: TestTerminalNoEscape::test_no_transition_out_of_terminal is parametrised over all 4 terminal states × all 10 BuildState targets = 40 cases. issues.description:
Advisory (non-blocking): task-work produced a report with 2 of 3 expected agent invocations. Missing phases: 3 (Implementation). Consider invoking these agents via the Task tool to strengthen stack-specific quality:
- Phase 3: `python-api-specialist` (Implementation)
No seam tests detected for cross-boundary feature. Consider adding seam/contract/boundary tests to validate technology boundary interactions. This is a recommendation, not a blocking gate.

rationale: All quality gates passed. Independent verification confirmed. All acceptance criteria met. Architecture context: 374 chars provided.
